channel.title: Mysteries on Grim Chronicle
channel.description: Recent content in Mysteries on Grim Chronicle

item.title: D.B. Cooper: The Only Unsolved Air Piracy in American History
item.description: On November 24, 1971, a man calling himself Dan Cooper hijacked a Northwest Orient flight, collected $200,000 in ransom, and parachuted into the night sky over the Pacific Northwest. He was never found. This is the full story.

item.title: The Dyatlov Pass Incident: Nine Hikers Dead, No Explanation That Makes Sense
item.description: In February 1959, nine experienced Soviet hikers died on a mountain in the Ural range under circumstances so bizarre that investigators officially concluded an 'unknown compelling force' had killed them. The case has never been fully solved.
